title: pentapogon aucklandicus
intro: Pentapogon aucklandicus is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass native to New Zealand and other parts of the Pacific. However, I found that Pentapogon aucklandicus is actually a synonym of the plant  Pentapogon aequinoctialis, and I could not find information on the medicinal properties or health benefits of this plant.
